phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book wine tasting
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo reservar una cata de vino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh pweh-DOH rreh-sehr-BAHR oo-nah KAH-tah deh BEE-noh?

likely_response.local: Llame al 957 49 75 00 o reserve en recepción.
likely_response.pronunciation: YAH-meh AHL OH reh-SEHR-beh EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out the form on the web or here.

responses.english: Fill out the form on the web or here.
responses.phonetic: YAH-meh AHL OH reh-SEHR-beh EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN
responses.french: Llame al 957 49 75 00 o reserve en recepción.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine cellars are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las bodegas de vino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs boh-DEH-gahs deh BEE-noh?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del patio, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the restaurant dining room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me indica el comedor del restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, meh in-DEE-kah el koh-meh-DOHR del res-tow-RAHN-teh?

likely_response.local: Subiendo las escaleras, primera puerta a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Up the stairs, first door on the right.

responses.english: Up the stairs, first door on the right.
responses.phonetic: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Subiendo las escaleras, primera puerta a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the private dining room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el salón privado para comidas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el sah-LOHN pree-VAH-doh pah-rah koh-MEE-dahs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the right.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo del pasillo, a la derecha.
